song.title: Lead Me to Calvary
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) King of my life, I crown Thee now, Thine shall the glory be; Lest I forget Thy thorn-crowned brow, Lead me to Calvary.
[C] Chorus Lest I forget Gethsemane, Lest I forget Thine agony; Lest I forget Thy love for me, Lead me to Calvary.
[V2] 2) Show me the tomb where Thou wast laid, Tenderly mourned and wept; Angels in robes of light arrayed Guarded Thee while Thou slept.
[V3] 3) Let me like Mary, through the gloom, Come with a gift to Thee, Show to me now the empty tomb, Lead me to Calvary.
[V4] 4) May I be willing, Lord, to bear Daily my cross for Thee; Even Thy cup of grief to share, Thou hast borne all for me.
[V5] 5) Fill me, O Lord, with Thy desire For all that know not Thee; Then touch my lips with holy fire, To speak of Calvary.
song.author: Jennie E. Hussey
